sentences.en: We need to double down on the channels that show positive unit economics.
sentences.zh: 我们需要加大投入在展现正向单位经济模型的渠道上。

sentences.en: The landing page bounce rate dropped after we simplified the value proposition.
sentences.zh: 简化价值主张后，落地页跳出率下降了。

sentences.en: Our re-engagement campaign brought back 12% of dormant users last month.
sentences.zh: 我们的唤醒营销活动上个月召回了12%的沉默用户。

sentences.en: The viral loop only works when existing users see clear incentives to share.
sentences.zh: 只有当现有用户看到明确的分享激励时，病毒循环才能生效。

sentences.en: We should sunset the referral bonus if the payback period exceeds 90 days.
sentences.zh: 如果回收期超过90天，我们应该停止推荐奖励。

example.en: A high bounce rate usually indicates a mismatch between ad copy and landing page content.
example.zh: 高跳出率通常意味着广告文案与落地页内容不匹配。

example.en: We classify users as dormant if they haven't logged in for 30 days.
example.zh: 如果用户30天未登录，我们将其归类为沉默用户。

example.en: Cash incentives drive short-term signups but don't guarantee long-term retention.
example.zh: 现金激励能推动短期注册，但不能保证长期留存。

example.en: The team decided to sunset the old loyalty program by the end of Q2.
example.zh: 团队决定在Q2结束前下线旧的忠诚度计划。

example.en: If the payback period is under 6 months, the channel is worth scaling.
example.zh: 如果回收期在6个月以内，这个渠道值得放量。

sentences.en: The crash rate spiked on Android after the latest release.
sentences.zh: 最新版本发布后，Android端崩溃率飙升。

sentences.en: We need to set up a feature flag before rolling out the new checkout flow.
sentences.zh: 在灰度发布新结算流程之前，我们需要先设置功能开关。

sentences.en: Session duration increased but conversion stayed flat, which suggests a UX bottleneck.
sentences.zh: 会话时长增加了但转化率持平，说明存在用户体验瓶颈。

sentences.en: The product spec should include edge cases for users with incomplete KYC.
sentences.zh: 产品需求文档应该包含未完成KYC认证用户的边界情况。

sentences.en: Our error budget is almost exhausted so we should freeze non-critical deployments.
sentences.zh: 我们的错误预算几乎耗尽，应该冻结非关键部署。

example.en: We need to bring the crash rate below 0.5% before the next app store review.
example.zh: 在下次应用商店审核前，我们需要把崩溃率降到0.5%以下。

example.en: Feature flags allow us to test changes with a small percentage of users first.
example.zh: 功能开关允许我们先对一小部分用户测试变更。

example.en: The QA team uncovered several edge cases that the original spec didn't address.
example.zh: QA团队发现了几个原始需求文档未涵盖的边界情况。

example.en: When the error budget runs out, the team must prioritize reliability over new features.
example.zh: 当错误预算耗尽时，团队必须优先保障稳定性而非新功能。

example.en: The payment gateway became the bottleneck during the flash sale.
example.zh: 闪购期间，支付网关成了瓶颈。

sentences.en: The stock has been trading sideways for two weeks ahead of the earnings call.
sentences.zh: 在财报电话会议之前，该股已横盘交易两周。

sentences.en: Institutional investors have been rotating out of growth stocks into value names.
sentences.zh: 机构投资者一直在从成长股轮动到价值股。

sentences.en: The company announced a $500 million share buyback program to support the stock price.
sentences.zh: 公司宣布了5亿美元的股票回购计划以支撑股价。

sentences.en: Net interest margin contracted due to the inverted yield curve.
sentences.zh: 由于收益率曲线倒挂，净息差收窄了。

sentences.en: The IPO was priced at the top of the range, reflecting strong institutional demand.
sentences.zh: IPO定价在区间上限，反映了机构需求强劲。

example.en: The index has been moving sideways as traders await the Fed decision.
example.zh: 在交易员等待美联储决议期间，指数一直横盘整理。

example.en: Share buybacks reduce the number of outstanding shares and boost earnings per share.
example.zh: 股票回购减少流通股数量，提升每股收益。

example.en: Banks with wider net interest margins tend to outperform in a rising rate environment.
example.zh: 净息差更大的银行在加息环境中往往表现更好。

example.en: An inverted yield curve is historically a reliable recession indicator.
example.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂历来是可靠的衰退指标。

example.en: The company plans to file for an IPO in the second half of this year.
example.zh: 公司计划在今年下半年申请IPO。

sentences.en: Let's do a skip-level meeting to get unfiltered feedback from the front-line team.
sentences.zh: 我们做一次跨级会议，直接获取一线团队的真实反馈。

sentences.en: The hiring bar should not drop just because we are under headcount pressure.
sentences.zh: 不能因为有人员编制压力就降低招聘标准。

sentences.en: I want each team lead to present their OKR progress in the Thursday all-hands.
sentences.zh: 我希望每个团队负责人在周四全员会上汇报OKR进展。

sentences.en: We need to address the knowledge silo before the senior engineer leaves next month.
sentences.zh: 在资深工程师下月离职前，我们需要解决知识孤岛问题。

sentences.en: The 360-degree feedback showed a gap between self-assessment and peer perception.
sentences.zh: 360度反馈显示自我评估与同事认知之间存在差距。

example.en: Skip-level meetings help managers understand issues that don't surface in regular reports.
example.zh: 跨级会议帮助管理者了解常规汇报中不会浮现的问题。

example.en: Maintaining a high hiring bar is essential for team quality in the long run.
example.zh: 保持高招聘标准对长期团队质量至关重要。

example.en: The CEO uses the monthly all-hands to share company strategy and celebrate wins.
example.zh: CEO利用月度全员会议分享公司战略并庆祝成绩。

example.en: Documentation and pair programming help break down knowledge silos.
example.zh: 文档和结对编程有助于打破知识孤岛。

example.en: Accurate self-assessment is a sign of professional maturity.
example.zh: 准确的自我评估是职业成熟度的标志。

sentences.en: Our land-and-expand strategy has proven effective in the SMB segment.
sentences.zh: 我们的先落地再扩展策略在中小企业客群中被证明是有效的。

sentences.en: We should evaluate the total addressable market before committing resources to this vertical.
sentences.zh: 在向这个垂直领域投入资源之前，我们应该评估总可达市场规模。

sentences.en: The competitive moat comes from our proprietary data, not from the technology itself.
sentences.zh: 竞争护城河来自我们的专有数据，而非技术本身。

sentences.en: Entering the Japan market requires a localization strategy beyond simple translation.
sentences.zh: 进入日本市场需要超越简单翻译的本地化策略。

sentences.en: The board wants us to achieve profitability before pursuing the next round of funding.
sentences.zh: 董事会希望我们在寻求下一轮融资之前实现盈利。

example.en: The land-and-expand model starts with a small deal and grows within the account.
example.zh: 先落地再扩展模式从小额交易开始，在客户内部逐步增长。

example.en: Investors want to see a TAM large enough to justify the valuation.
example.zh: 投资者希望看到足够大的TAM来支撑估值。

example.en: Network effects create a strong moat that is hard for competitors to replicate.
example.zh: 网络效应创造了竞争对手难以复制的强大护城河。

example.en: Localization includes adapting the product to local regulations, language, and user habits.
example.zh: 本地化包括将产品适配当地法规、语言和用户习惯。

example.en: The path to profitability requires cutting customer acquisition costs by at least 30%.
example.zh: 实现盈利的路径需要将获客成本至少降低30%。
